title: Homestead
description: Reworked advancements, item names, and more!
body:
Homestead is a lightweight datapack that reworks the advancements menu to be more streamlined, renames many vanilla items to be more aesthetically pleasing, and makes some miscellaneous changes such as recipe tweaks and Ender Pearl particles.

**Note:** Homestead removes various advancements that other packs may also modify or change. For the best experience, try to load Homestead BEFORE other datapacks so their advancement changes override mine.
